summary: Focused on applied mathematics, machine learning, optimization, and software development through academic research and engineering projects.

thesis.title: Enhancing Generalization of BISINDO Gesture Recognition Using Realistic 3D Keypoint Augmentation
highlights: Designed a realistic 3D keypoint augmentation framework.
Developed a complete machine learning pipeline using MediaPipe and PyTorch.

activities: Head of Machine Learning / Artificial Intelligence Division, GDGoC Universitas Negeri Malang
